productDisplayName: Estelle Women Gold Pendant with Chain
description: Style NoteStatement jewellery can stand out without an overdose of colour pop or gaudy beads. This neckpiece from estelle is a testament to elegant statement jewellery. Flavour your pastel favourites or polish your ethnic wear with this slender chain. Don't forget to keep the rest of your accessories tonal!Warranty: 1 yearProduct DetailsSlender gold chain with a lobster clasp that has adjustable linksHas a double "S" shaped pendant with one white stone embellishment at the centreMaterial and care24 carat gold platedPewter base metalHigh quality imported Crystals/CZsWipe with a clean cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength of chain: 40  cm
